purpose: Fresh bounded local Canny quality matrix baseline using current v6 wording and a new seed; compare eye readability, skin texture, jaw/collar separation, clothing coverage, and control-map leakage.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, natural skin texture, realistic fine skin pores, subtle human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clean catchlights, clear iris detail, gentle eye fill light, open shadow detail, detailed hair, edge-guided composition, coherent silhouette, clean jawline and neck separation, crisp shirt collar boundary, tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, beauty filter skin, airbrushed face, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, edge artifacts, harsh outlines, colored blotches, paint marks, over-dark eyes, underexposed eyes, muddy shadows, crushed shadows, smeared jawline, warped collar edge, control map stains, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso
